creator: dmitry@grechka.family
text:
The port installation fails as it conflicts with mariadb102-client.


===>  Installing for mariadb-connector-c-3.0.3_1
===>  Checking if mariadb-connector-c already installed
===>   Registering installation for mariadb-connector-c-3.0.3_1
Installing mariadb-connector-c-3.0.3_1...
pkg-static: mariadb-connector-c-3.0.3_1 conflicts with mariadb102-client-10.2.13 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/mariadb_config
*** Error code 70



Can the port skip installation of the /usr/local/bin/mariadb_config if it is already present?
